author: codex-root

patch.value: Auto Release blocker issue lookup split a quoted search query
The first production auto-release published v2026.7.21 successfully, then the parent workflow failed while searching for a stale blocker issue because escaped quotes were passed literally to gh.
Both blocker issue lookups pass the complete title search as one argument; a production same-day release completes the parent workflow
Keep successful scheduled releases green and make blocker issue maintenance reliable.
Prevents false failed runs after successful publication.
The parent Auto Release workflow completes after the tag publisher succeeds.
Production run 29855651273 exposed the post-publication failure.
Publish a release, then execute the stale scheduled release blocker cleanup step.
The issue search receives one query argument and the step succeeds whether or not an issue exists.
gh rejected the split words as unknown arguments after v2026.7.21 was already published.
No package outage; the successfully published release was reported as a failed parent workflow.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Production evidence is public: Auto Release run 29855651273 reached successful tag publication, then failed only in stale-blocker cleanup; tag-driven Release run 29855763180 succeeded.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: The release guard correctly rejected an empty 2026.7.21-2 section until this distinct production fix had explicit release lineage.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: A post-publication maintenance step can make the parent run red even when the artifact is healthy; it must be tested as part of end-to-end release proof.

value.note: Quote blocker issue search queries explicitly

message: Track production-discovered blocker cleanup failure for the same-day corrective release

value.note: Both blocker lookup paths pass the named search query variable

author: codex-root

patch.value: The linked structural command passed for both paths; PR 57 merged with all CI and security checks green.
Both blocker lookup paths accept the complete title query and the parent workflow can finish after publication.
Introduced an explicit search_query variable and passed it as one quoted argument in both stale-blocker cleanup and scheduled-failure reporting.
Quoted blocker issue lookup fixed, locally exercised, reviewed, merged, and assigned to the corrective release.

message: Close production follow-up for corrective release changelog generation

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Independent registry proof returned version 2026.7.21-2 and exact execution succeeded via npm install plus npx and Bun add plus bunx. The v2026.7.21-2 tag contains matching package.json and Commander CLI versions, and no scheduled-release blocker issue remains open.

patch.value: Auto Release run 29856833835 completed every step, Release run 29856953305 published v2026.7.21-2, and independent exact-version checks passed through npm, npx, Bun, and bunx.
